planets.name: Don
planets.summary: Archive cluster around don: 145 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2023-11-18
artifacts.excerpt:
So many bad takes...

Tech Twitter doesn't understand or believe that AGI/ASI may be here soon

EA, the board, and Ilya are not flippant

They don't want to destroy OpenAI or seize power

It's likely Ilya saw something scary (or Sam/Greg hid something) related to Gobi / GPT-4.5
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, want, risk, should.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2023-11-18
artifacts.excerpt:
Everyone rushing to have strong early takes that IMO will age poorly when details come out

I'd be shocked if Sam was removed for something small or ungrounded

The board is likely being cagey because they don't want to sound the alarm - WE'RE CLOSER TO AGI THAN ANYONE THINKS
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, want, risk, should.
